title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 22 October 2021
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 22 October 2021
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 22 October 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 23/10/2021
The subcontinent recycling market is witnessing a surge of enquiries from interested end buyers as the steel prices are skyrocketing across the globe
Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2021-07-24_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-3.pdf

hekllenic

RECYCLING
R EPORT
16th July to 23rd July 2021
Hi ghlights of the Week
The subcontinent market continues its strong price rally by touching newer
heights every passing day. With very few vessels being floated in the
jhh nhu
demolition market, this upward trend is set to continue for the upcoming
weeks. On the demand and pricing front, Bangladesh leads the chart by
bidding aggressively for any available tonnage, closely followed by Pakistan.
